hero.headline: Get repair quotes from nearby shops — without calling around.
hero.subheadline: Create a Repair Request in 1 minute. Compare Quotes. Save money.

flow.title: How It Works
flow.subtitle: Follow the journey from request to repair

step1.title: Create Repair Request
step1.driverText: Enter car details, describe the issue, set radius in km.
step1.shopText: Requests arrive automatically if you're within the radius.

step2.title: Shop Reviews
step2.driverText: See which shops are actively reviewing your request.
step2.shopText: One tap to signal you're preparing a Quote.

step3.title: Clarify Details
step3.driverText: Answer questions to improve quote accuracy.

step4.title: Receive Quotes
step4.shopText: Send a fixed price or a range with a short comment.

step5.title: Choose & Connect
step5.driverText: Shortlist the best option and contact the shop.

driver.title: For Drivers
driver.benefit1Desc: Compare real quotes instead of guessing prices.
driver.benefit2Desc: One request reaches every shop in your radius.

shop.title: For Shops
shop.benefit1Desc: Every request comes from a driver ready to repair.
shop.benefit2Desc: Ask questions and quote directly in the app.
shop.benefit3Desc: Compete on value in your neighborhood.

conversion.driverTitle: Ready to find the best deal?

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How is the search radius calculated?
faq.a1: We use your location (or entered address) as the center and find every shop within the distance you set — straight-line radius in km.
faq.a2: Yes, creating repair requests and receiving quotes is completely free for drivers.
faq.q3: Do shops see each other's quotes?
faq.a3: No. Each shop's quote is private. Only the driver can see and compare all quotes.
faq.q4: When do I see a shop's phone number?
faq.a4: After a shop sends a quote and chooses to share their phone number, it becomes visible on their quote card.
faq.q5: Can I close a request early?
faq.a5: Yes, you can close a request at any time. Open quotes remain visible but no new ones will arrive.
faq.q6: What happens after I mark a shop as 'Interested'?
faq.a6: The shop is notified. If they shared their phone number, you'll see it immediately. You can then contact them directly.
